label: Transparent protea bloom motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Protea transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create only a fynbos protea bloom botanical motif for a design-system catalog, isolated as a single complete subject on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A sculptural protea bloom with rose-pink pointed bracts, pale bract interiors, dense central cone texture, sage-green leathery leaves, rust-tipped edges, and warm cone-brown shadows. Botanical accuracy, crisp subject edges, architectural fynbos identity, no dahlia, no artichoke.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; include full bloom, leaves, and short stem without cropping. Clean studio lighting, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no dahlia rosette, no rose spiral, no artichoke vegetable, no bouquet, no vase, no landscape, no hand, no text, no watermark.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Protea light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode design-system board for a Morphous theme named "Morphous Protea", derived from the visible fynbos protea bloom cutout. This board is a source reference for implementing a shadcn/tweakcn-compatible sculptural dashboard system.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Protea, Protea Bloom, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Extract the palette and interaction language from rose-pink bracts, pale bract interiors, rust tips, sage leaves, fynbos sand surfaces, central cone texture, and cone-brown depth. The board must read as protea, not dahlia, rose, artichoke, or generic pink dashboard.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, dashboard navigation, analytics metric cards, segmented controls, chart panels, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Style: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style product design system, precise grid, 8px card radius, fynbos-sand backgrounds, protea-rose primary actions, bract-pink secondary surfaces, rust-tip highlights, sage-leaf controls, cone-texture token samples, sculptural panel grouping.
Constraints: no dahlia rosette, no rose spiral, no artichoke leaves, no generic purple/blue gradients, no unrelated saturated colors, no beige-only palette, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Protea", no tiny unreadable paragraphs.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Protea dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode design-system board for the Morphous theme named "Morphous Protea". It must feel like the visible light-mode board translated to dark mode, not a new theme, and it must remain derived from the visible fynbos protea bloom cutout.
Canvas: wide 16:9 high-resolution board, clean professional UI design-system presentation.
Required visible sections: Morphous Protea, Protea Bloom, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens.
Reference use: Preserve the protea system language: cone-ink dark backgrounds, pale bract text, protea-rose active states, bract-pink surfaces, rust-tip chart highlights, sage-leaf focus and success controls, cone-texture overlays, sculptural 8px shadcn/tweakcn grid. Must read as protea, not dahlia, rose, artichoke, or generic pink dashboard.
Typography: English product UI examples with Japanese typography guidance; labels such as Geist, Noto Sans JP, Display, Body, Label, Numbers, 日本語 UI. Keep text short and legible.
UI coverage: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, table rows, search command palette, dashboard navigation, analytics metric cards, segmented controls, chart panels, empty/loading/error states, spacing, radius, border, shadow, texture samples, simple icons.
Visual details: cone-ink and cone-brown surfaces, pale bract foreground, protea-rose controls, rust-tip highlights, sage-leaf status, bract-pink accents, subtle central-cone texture overlays, restrained contrast, crisp cards and controls.
Constraints: no dahlia rosette, no rose spiral, no artichoke leaves, no neon colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no pure-black-only flat background, no illegible tiny paragraphs, no watermark, no random brand names, no misspelling of "Morphous Protea".
